name: powerpost
tagline: Generate captions, create images, and publish to all major platforms
description:
PowerPost generates social media content and publishes it. Give it a topic, an image, or a video — it researches context across multiple AI models, writes platform-specific captions in your brand voice, generates matching images, and publishes to Instagram, TikTok, X, YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn, and more as they're added.

Features:
- Content generation from text, images, or video input
- Deep research mode for higher-quality, research-backed content
- Image generation with multiple models (FLUX.2 Flex, Ideogram 3.0, GPT Image 1.5, Nano Banana 2)
- Custom writing styles to match your brand voice
- Draft-first workflow with approval before publishing
- read_draft API keys for safe automation (generate but can't publish)
- Workspace isolation for multi-brand management
- Webhook notifications for async workflows
- Credit-based pricing

network.justification: All API calls go to powerpost.ai REST API for content generation, image generation, and social media publishing

env.POWERPOST_API_KEY: API key for authenticating with the PowerPost API. Get one at https://powerpost.ai/settings/api
env.POWERPOST_WORKSPACE_ID: Workspace ID for scoping content. Find it at https://powerpost.ai/settings/workspaces
